key.name: transparent-mode
key.description: If enabled, the top bar will be transparent when no window is near it, and solid when a window is close.

key.name: transparency-level
key.description: Background transparency level (0 = fully transparent, 1 = opaque)

key.name: compact-mode
key.description: If enabled, the top bar height will be reduced for more screen space.

key.name: fade-text-on-fullscreen
key.description: If enabled, the top bar text will fade when an application is fullscreen.
